ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each patient case */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the case */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the patient was registered */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date the patient was discharged */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the case (e.g., admitted, discharged, in treatment) */,
  "admission_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the patient's admission */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Initial diagnosis of the patient */,
  "treatment_plan" TEXT /* Treatment plan for the patient */,
  "discharge_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the discharge */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital where the case is handled */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the case */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the case */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the case was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the case was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "case_id" TEXT /* Reference to the patient case the activity belongs to */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity (e.g., Registration, Triage and Assessment) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource performing the activity */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "complete_time" TEXT /* Completion time of the activity */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the activity (importance and complexity) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in minutes */,
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity type */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the activity took place */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the activity (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the activity */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the activity */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_activity_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_type_id") REFERENCES activity_types ("activity_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource (e.g., Resource1, Resource3) */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., nurse, doctor, equipment) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the resource belongs to */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the resource */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital where the resource is located */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the resource */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the resource (e.g., available, busy) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the resource */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the emergency contact */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider of the patient */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number of the patient */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the patient record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the patient record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "activity_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity type (e.g., Registration, Triage and Assessment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the activity type */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the activity type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_types_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_types_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., nurse, doctor, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital where the user works */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., admin, staff) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
